city_metadata.city_summary: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025. Among U.S. cities with a population of 300,000 or more, San Francisco is ranked first by per capita income, second by population density, and sixth by aggregate income as of 2023. Some 4.6 million residents live in the city's metropolitan statistical area, which is the 13th-largest in the United States.

tags.description:en: The SkyStar Wheel is a Ferris wheel located at Fisherman’s Wharf, offering views of San Francisco, the Bay, and nearby landmarks. The ride lasts approximately 12 minutes and is a popular attraction for tourists.
tags.name: Skystar Wheel - Fisherman’s Wharf
tags.note:charge: 19 USD/person for general admission;50 USD/person for VIP, and kids/senior discount available.
tags.note:start_date: an Francisco's Fisherman's Wharf since November 13, 2023. It has previously operated in San Francisco's Music Concourse (2020–2023), Cincinnati's The Banks (2018–2020), Louisville's Waterfront Park (2018), and Norfolk (2018). via https://en.wikipedia.org/
